name: Golf Center of Arlington
address: 1301 NE Green Oaks Blvd, Arlington, TX 76006
about: Golf Center of Arlington is a premier golf destination in the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex, featuring an award-winning driving range with Toptracer and TrackMan technologies. The facility offers a comprehensive golf experience with 36-hole miniature golf, putting and chipping greens, and covered and heated bays for year-round play. It also includes a local craft beer bar with over 50 options and amenities like the PowerTee automatic teeing system and a pristine grass hitting area. The venue is designed for various activities, from individual practice to hosting large events like corporate outings, birthday parties, and fundraisers.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Toptracer and TrackMan technologies for advanced ball flight data
Variety of amenities including a craft beer bar and 36-hole miniature golf course
Heated and covered bays for year-round comfort and play

food_and_drink.notes: No explicit mention of food service beyond the bar
Local craft beer bar with over 50 options available

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end launch monitor with advanced ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available, though bringing your own clubs is recommended for a personalized experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is allowed, but the venue has a craft beer bar with over 50 options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time varies, but typically 18 holes on the Toptracer system takes 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and the game mode chosen.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is very kid-friendly, featuring a 36-hole miniature golf course and options for hosting birthday parties.
